creator: mono@FreeBSD.org
text:
Smuxi is an irssi-inspired, flexible, user-friendly and cross-platform IRC
client for advanced users, targeting the GNOME desktop.

WWW:	http://www.smuxi.org

This port depends on:
  - ports/141441: [new port] devel/log4net: Port for .NET of the Apache Logging Services project
  - ports/141442: [new port] devel/nini: NET configuration library
  - ports/141443: [new port] irc/smartirc4net: Multi-layered IRC library
